hf896fb14gfff2g4093g8f1ag647bbc410b5a: Tsk. That flat nose of yours has gone poking in our business.
h2d47901cg7ffbg4f22g95f4g02ca7e93b1c0: Tsk. That damned nose of yours has gone poking in our business.
h8792f7c2g9367g4582ga081g2d81ca30583b: Shh-shh. No need. It couldn't be helped.
h83edb30cg8586g4466ga78cg2ddcb1534b95: Kagha! What is the meaning of this?
h0642aac2gf113g4a9bg9be8gfb4509e21bc4: You think yourself quite the spy, don't you? Go on - tell him.
h4ccc8badg5ebeg4201ga08cg3467ed714237: Take this letter, Rath. It will explain everything.
hc5d5d6d4g3f92g4d3fg9b91g5feeb61587a6: What in the... Cloakwood? Kagha - have you lost your mind?!
h8853debeg38f9g4ca4g8712gdc386faa7a92: Halsin is weak, Rath. But in the shadows, we are strong, we are safe. There is no other way.
h027c398cg8c6eg4e1cg8aafg3285cae80600: You and Halsin welcome untouchables to your midst.
hd1c150fcgacd4g44d4ga4b2g31b91c4d23b7: You defile the grove for the sake of 'harmony'.
hca629652g3369g4947g82dagb269d3f86555: Olodan speaks truth. Do you disagree, Rath? You would see this grove in ruin?
h0a7d1c7cgcf70g4bc1gbf8age8866d9a6f4a: The choice is made. Kagha: burn the tainted away. Start with the snitch.
h670b810egb051g4ae7g8ac4gb191a1b250cc: You're so desperate to be proven right - it's made you forget who you really are.
hf449fef6gece9g45b7gb16fgbf27540c10b9: I - yes. When the darkest hour fell, it was us that brought light.
h30ba628bg429dg4d62g8508g645e6a3db0ee: Can't you feel how the prayer disturbs the soil and air? The grove trembles in fear.
h256b0587gb8adg45cag8c21g2a0c7568f1a1: It... it trembles in shame. It knows that in harmony, we perish. In shadow, we are pure.
hb4684d30g909eg49cag8903g9a0c3f3702a3: The grove may thrive only when the great vine strangles those who imperil it.
hf5e1a3fbg97c8g4d6dg90d3g2eec9e95ab31: Harmony is not weakness - it is balance. Strength. Silvanus calls on you to preserve it.
ha51ba744ga663g4facg8d9egb1bfec1dbb6d: No! You... you twist the teachings. In harmony, we perish. In shadow, we are pure.
hc5767890g32d4g42d9g9233gccce953e287a: *Kagha's voice breaks and her lips tremble. She heard reason in your words.*
h15192a11g880bg4836g822bg5eb9bb3dfaa2: Recite the frescos you have read. Remind Kagha of the grove's legacy.
hcc75b6d2g5ebeg4f8cgb880gaf8fe56e8697: *Kagha eyes you intently as you speak the text etched into the frescos.*
h110a8c48g39d6g4807gb41eg4290895d49fe:
*'By claw and tooth, from root to thorn,
The Old Oak's grove, to wildlings sworn.'*
h83f08a7bg61ceg4ffcgbb84gdb3c99209e16:
*'The forest rose with claw and tooth
to tear the darkness from its roots.'*
haadaf5a4g9122g4a03g956bg36f6fdbda7ec:
*'In darkest hour, a concord made,
'Twixt harp and wild against the shade.'*
h6bd39897g3472g4658g9d1cgd4fee9eeaef6:
*'The towers seized, the battle done,
the moonrise broke the Darkest One.'*
h39b463ecgdaa6g4b23gb5f1g8e4dae1fc214: When... when the darkest hour fell, it was us that brought light.
h38bbf6dfg9d18g49b6gad1fg09a83dcf9895: Silvanus demands we illuminate shadow, not hide within it.
h2187d8b7gdcd7g43e7gb33dgb0c9bb12ad8e: How - how was I so blind?
hb6e34f26gb5b5g44f5g9b2bg33c16c01fd18: Careful, Kagha. The shadows don't forgive.
h91e27559g8bc2g4c34g92aegf96003ec899e: I belong to the shadows no longer. You've no power over me!
h1181ac91g76b7g4a67g938dg3dfaf2ab81ac: You would question my power? Mother Earth, hear me. Grant me your wrath!
hc0bb3c8bge8b2g4fb3g8f1agd607e02f3b96: Recite the frescos you have read. Instill her with pride in the grove's legacy.
hc1686636gc041g49c6ga668g0a0535d2c064: Empty ramblings, all of them. While you obsess over yesterday, I will be making our tomorrow.
h3ef1aa48gffd8g48f1g8d7dg7a25b9b99674: I take this grove for the shadows!
h918563d4g1a27g4203g8794g014cfd32b7dc: Recite the frescos you have read. Remind Kagha of the grove's legacy.
hca197702g5e3eg484fg81c6gacda95f66a05: I know these druids' ways. All they touch is fated to decay.
hb5655e89ga3d0g444fgad9agac1a36f1cf22: I know these druids' ways. In their hands, this grove will decay.
h2fd97c63gef34g4ab2g9c3eg4c049c5b45ea: You know I'm right. Don't let the shadows corrupt you.
h370cdf92g35b2g45a3g889cg4ed57c6fdf25: The shadows will only corrupt - you don't need them.
hd2e68ba4g6866g4a26gaa3dgc3d53ed1925b: I tried reasoning with you. Looks like it'll take blood to settle this.
h3789fd7dg1ab9g4af1gba0dg6d6468b2e2ab: *You watch Kagha closely. If she is moved by your plea, she gives no sign.*
hf46c1bd6g6037g439ag8b46g11182b8212a8: Silvanus calls on me to shield the circle, balance be damned.
h28ff4da5ga640g4994g8513g289b209c2d36: Olodan, strike. We take this grove for the shadows!
h19e9df14gc228g4fd5g8694g616767416e3b: The shadows won't save you - they'll corrupt you. Stop this, while you can.
h1b637efag26b8g4e08g84d5gba1fd5907d28: No! You... you don't know what you say. In shadow, we are purified.
h137156ceg2e96g4aaag9519g2e042af2cf0a: The shadows don't corrupt us - they cleanse us.
habd379b6gb64fg4ab5ga68fg4d4c2240e922: With the grove taken for Cloakwood, the Circle will see that I'm right. The Great Mother will guard us from all danger.
h76f1c0b8g8a3dg4cecg9cdcg127c035ba7b6: Take the grove - I won't stand in your way.
he2c82986g60b4g4502gae65g5eda2ce2415d: Oh, but you already have. Or does my memory fail so completely?
h818812e0g9654g4d3bgb3c8g1383332710ab: End them, Kagha. Unless you have... lost your nerve.
hb15602c1g2d34g406dg8bc6g99eec1edd853: Spare my life, so I might join the Cloakwood druids.
h2b6d55d9gd8deg45a2ga190gb925e0721757: No one joins the Shadow Druids. Oh, no - their presence is requested.
hdd64efbcg7235g4970g9c16g0348cf4a9cb6: And I don't recall sending an invitation.
hd02803bcg217ag4038ga915gbf1340e90e5e: You seem intent on forcing me to take your life. So be it.
h28809738g8f38g4c13ga7a7g1661cfb4fed5: Olodan speaks truth. Who among you disagrees? Who would see this grove in ruin?
h2aec0fd1g50e0g41afg802cg701a35d8e414: Olodan speaks truth. Who among you disagrees? Who would see this grove in ruin?
hbb736982gcdd0g415fg84bcg65d7ba701688: Olodan speaks truth. Do you disagree? Would you see this grove in ruin?
h57baf4d3g1a51g4b7cgbfcdgb3ef8176568a: Kagha's a Shadow Druid. She means to convert the circle.
h89dcd6adg9baeg46f5gb5fdgd89a45216a59: A Shadow Druid? Kagha, have you lost your mind?!
h29aacb01g87c9g4b71gacfbg9ea1211bc65d: Forget it, rat. You can explain it yourself.
h09700d35g94cag454fgb219g26ac9a7de537: You'd decline the honour? Very well.
h312c34cfgfd30g4721g8da3g7be794e6267f: Halsin's always welcomed untouchables to your midst. Defiled the grove for the sake of 'harmony'.
h78be977ag7cf2g453cg8a81gf727bffbbb04: We've come from Cloakwood to correct his mistakes.
hbdc112aag1132g4081gb98eg8ea0854db687: Cloakwood... Shadow Druids? Kagha, have you lost your mind?!
h9c9983a7g282ag4df1gba56gcacd841b2897: The Shadow Druids are taking over - the circle is overdue some change.
h4c9cc8efgc9cdg4c03g838eg992679803159: Shadow Druids? Kagha, have you lost your mind?!
